long_description:
This baremetal node is an availability test node. It has just been power-pulled and needs reclaim retried.
Incident source: https://performance.w3.cloud.ibm.com/grafana/d/ibmcloud-avail-test/bare-metal-availability-tests?orgId=1 - Mark Rogalski
